div.div:
Legend
■ cyan branch — visible in mobile bottom-nav (Home · Library · Scan · Insights)
□ grey branch — desktop sidebar only
◌ dashed — desktop-only branch (Rips)
▸ green — nested or post-scan route, outside the shell

div.div:
Navigation chrome by form factor
Desktop wide: persistent sidebar shows all 8 branches.
Desktop narrow: sidebar auto-collapses into a drawer.
Mobile: glassmorphism bottom-nav with raised Scan FAB shows Home, Library, Scan, Insights. Shelves accessed via Library AppBar; Settings via overflow.
